question_primary: What is the capital of India?
explanation_primary: Delhi has been the capital of India since 1911.
Subject: Indian Polity

question_primary: Who is known as the Father of the Indian Constitution?
explanation_primary: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar chaired the Drafting Committee of the Indian Constitution.
explanation_secondary: డాక్టర్ బి.ఆర్. అంబేద్కర్ రాజ్యాంగ రచనా సమితికి అధ్యక్షుడు.
Subject: Indian Polity

question_primary: Which Article of the Constitution abolishes untouchability?
question_secondary: రాజ్యాంగంలో ఏ అధికరణం అంటరానితనాన్ని రద్దు చేస్తుంది?
explanation_primary: Article 17 abolishes untouchability and forbids its practice in any form.
explanation_secondary: అధికరణ 17 అంటరానితనాన్ని రద్దు చేసి దానిని ఏ రూపంలోనైనా ఆచరించడాన్ని నిషేధిస్తుంది.
Subject: Indian Polity

question_primary: What is the speed of light in vacuum?
explanation_primary: The speed of light in vacuum is approximately 3 × 10^8 m/s.
Subject: Optics

question_primary: Read the following passage: The Indian National Congress was founded in 1885 by A.O. Hume. It played a central role in India's independence movement.
Subject: History

question_primary: In which year was the Indian National Congress founded?
question_secondary: భారత జాతీయ కాంగ్రెస్ ఏ సంవత్సరంలో స్థాపించబడింది?
explanation_primary: The INC was founded on 28 December 1885 by A.O. Hume.
explanation_secondary: INC 28 డిసెంబర్ 1885న A.O. హ్యూమ్ చేత స్థాపించబడింది.
Subject: Modern History
